ddls:
CREATE TABLE "entities" (
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each entity */,
  "entity_name" TEXT /* Name of the entity (country) */,
  "iso_code" TEXT /* ISO code for the entity */,
  "continent" TEXT /* Continent the entity belongs to */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region the entity belongs to */,
  "population" INTEGER /* Population of the entity */,
  "area_km2" REAL /* Area of the entity in square kilometers */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "climate_data" (
  "data_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each climate data record */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the entity (country) the data belongs to */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year the data was collected */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month the data was collected */,
  "day" INTEGER /* Day the data was collected */,
  "surface_temp_anomaly" REAL /* Surface temperature anomaly */,
  "surface_temp_anomaly_by_population" REAL /* Surface temperature anomaly weighted by population */,
  "surface_temp_anomaly_by_area" REAL /* Surface temperature anomaly weighted by area */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source used */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("data_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_source_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_id") REFERENCES data_sources ("source_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_climate_data_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_sources" (
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source */,
  "source_name" TEXT /* Name of the data source */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the data source */,
  "collection_method" TEXT /* Method used to collect climate data */,
  "collection_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of data collection */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data source */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("source_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_source_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data source version */,
  "source_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the data source */,
  "version" TEXT /* Version of the data source */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the version was released */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the changes made in this version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user account */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, administrator) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (country) the data belongs to */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user granted the permission */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (country) the permission applies to */,
  "permission_level" TEXT /* Level of permission granted (e.g., read-only, read-write) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_downloads" (
  "download_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each download event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who downloaded the data */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (country) the data belongs to */,
  "download_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was downloaded */,
  "download_time" TEXT /* Time when the data was downloaded */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("download_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_downloads_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "report_time" TEXT /* Time when the report was generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report generated (e.g., climate trends, data usage) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_contents" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report content */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report the content belongs to */,
  "entity_id" INTEGER /* ID of the entity (country) the content applies to */,
  "climate_data" TEXT /* Climate data included in the report */,
  "additional_info" TEXT /* Additional information included in the report */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_contents_entity_id FOREIGN KEY ("entity_id") REFERENCES entities ("entity_id")
)
